SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_OONP_COPAY_3M 
TYPE: 
NUM

SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 

COMMENT: 
This variable was only populated in 2006–2007. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage rather than a 
co-payment amount will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment 
variable called (PRE_ICL_OONP_COINS_3M). 
The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part
